task: Flagship expert task: Aircraft MEL Dispatch Reliability and Deferred-Defect Risk Review. Reality context: an airline maintenance controller must decide whether an aircraft can dispatch with multiple deferred defects. Embedded packet: defects: D1 pack_left_inop MEL_allowed=Y repair_interval_days=10 days_remaining=2 operational_penalty=medium, D2 APU_inop allowed=Y remaining=1 penalty=high, D3 weather_radar_inop allowed=Y remaining=5 route_convective_weather=Y, D4 lav_smoke_detector_inop allowed=N remaining=0; flight ETOPS=N, destination_weather=storm_risk. Rules and constraints: Apply MEL permissions and route constraints, classify dispatch/no-dispatch, and recommend repair priority. Any not-allowed defect blocks dispatch. Required work: deliver mel_dispatch_risk.xlsx + maintenance_control_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
